title: Project Directory Structure SOP
author: Meyering, Bo
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: TLI - Perennial Legumes Program Document Title : Project Directory Structure SOP_ID : TLI_PLP_10.5281/zenodo.8422458 Version : 1.0.2 Summary : The purpose of this document is to standardize the directory structure of a new project for use within the perennial legumes program at TLI. The specific details covered are the project directory structure with all folders, intent of use for each folder, required and optional files, and specifications for those file types. This procedure is limited to the scope of creating new project directories, which are used to track data that is collected in the project, methods of the project design and implementation, and a README file for others to refer to in the future. The scope of this procedure excludes other types of directories for specific and limited purposes such as software development, machine learning projects, publications, etc. This procedure is further limited to use within the perennial legumes program and may not apply to other research projects within the larger TLI or research community.
